data.content: Planning complete. The fix should enforce lease-only identity propagation: no agent identity flags on claim/next/update flows, lease-derived normalization for handoff metadata and usernames, and a Foolery-side fallback for ReTakes step metadata if shipped knots no longer expose `step_history`. Primary implementation targets are the Knots execution wrappers, lease runtime, agent identity normalization, and Knots backend metadata hydration, with regression tests covering both the lease contract and shipped ReTakes rendering.
